---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Link to an issue if it exists.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when …"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why this one?

## Scope

Which part of the project does this touch?

- [ ] Site (`site/`)
- [ ] API (`api/`)
- [ ] Bot (`bot/`)
- [ ] Infrastructure (`infra/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: _____

## Examples

Mockups, screenshots, code snippets, or links to similar features elsewhere.

## Additional context

Anything else you think is relevant.
